query:
-- Responsáveis financeiros criados
SELECT id, name, type, email, phone, created_at FROM financial_responsibles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Vínculos de responsáveis com unidades
SELECT fru.id, fru.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, fru.responsible_id, fr.name as responsible_name, fru.effective_from
FROM financial_responsible_units fru
JOIN units u ON u.id = fru.unit_id
JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = fru.responsible_id
ORDER BY fru.effective_from DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Billing visit events
SELECT id, report_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, financial_responsible_id, system_amount_due, doctor_amount_due, pricing_status, signed_at
FROM billing_visit_events
ORDER BY signed_at DESC LIMIT 10;

-- Laudos existentes (para saber se há algo para testar)
SELECT r.id, r.status, r.unit_id, u.name as unit_name, r.author_user_id, r.signed_at
FROM reports r
JOIN units u ON u.id = r.unit_id
ORDER BY r.signed_at DESC LIMIT 10;
